name: Drawer
description: Slide-up sheet for mobile-first contextual content.

api.name: Drawer
api.description: Slide-up sheet for mobile-first contextual content.

parameters.name: OnBeforeClose
parameters.description: Fires before any user-initiated dismiss (Escape, backdrop click, swipe gesture, or a DrawerClose trigger). Set Cancel to true to abort. The Reason tells you which path fired ("escape", "outside", "swipe", "close").

events.name: OnBeforeClose
events.description: Fires before any user-initiated dismiss (Escape, backdrop click, swipe gesture, or a DrawerClose trigger). Set Cancel to true to abort. The Reason tells you which path fired ("escape", "outside", "swipe", "close").

records.name: DrawerContext
records.signature: DrawerContext(bool IsOpen, EventCallback<bool> SetOpen, string TitleId, string DescriptionId, Func<string, Task<bool>> TryDismiss)

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
<Drawer @bind-Open="_isOpen">
    <DrawerTrigger>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Open Drawer</Button>
    </DrawerTrigger>
    <DrawerContent>
        <DrawerHeader>
            <DrawerTitle>Move Goal</DrawerTitle>
            <DrawerDescription>Set your daily activity goal.</DrawerDescription>
        </DrawerHeader>
        <Stack Gap="0" Class="p-4 text-center">
            <Lumeo.Text Size="5xl" Weight="bold">@_goal</Lumeo.Text>
            <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">calories/day</Lumeo.Text>
        </Stack>
        <DrawerFooter>
            <DrawerClose>
                <Button Class="w-full">Submit</Button>
            </DrawerClose>
            <DrawerClose>
                <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline" Class="w-full">Cancel</Button>
            </DrawerClose>
        </DrawerFooter>
    </DrawerContent>
</Drawer>

@code {
    private bool _isOpen;
    private int _goal = 350;
}

examples.title: Filters Drawer
examples.code: Filter Results Narrow down your search.

examples.title: Prevent Close
examples.code:
<Drawer @bind-Open="_preventDrawerOpen">
    <DrawerTrigger>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Open Protected Drawer</Button>
    </DrawerTrigger>
    <DrawerContent PreventClose="true">
        <DrawerHeader>
            <DrawerTitle>Confirm Action</DrawerTitle>
            <DrawerDescription>You must choose an option to continue.</DrawerDescription>
        </DrawerHeader>
        <Stack Gap="2" Class="p-4">
            <Button Class="w-full" OnClick="@(() => _preventDrawerOpen = false)">Confirm</Button>
            <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline" Class="w-full" OnClick="@(() => _preventDrawerOpen = false)">Cancel</Button>
        </Stack>
    </DrawerContent>
</Drawer>

@code {
    private bool _preventDrawerOpen;
}

examples.title: Snap points (touch)
examples.code:
<Drawer @bind-Open="_snapOpen">
    <DrawerTrigger>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Open Snap Drawer</Button>
    </DrawerTrigger>
    <DrawerContent SnapPoints="_snapPoints" @bind-ActiveSnapPoint="_snapIndex">
        <DrawerHeader>
            <DrawerTitle>Snap Drawer</DrawerTitle>
            <DrawerDescription>Drag the handle to snap between 40%, 75%, and full height.</DrawerDescription>
        </DrawerHeader>
        <Stack Gap="2" Class="p-4">
            @* …content… *@
        </Stack>
        <DrawerFooter>
            <DrawerClose><Button Class="w-full">Close</Button></DrawerClose>
        </DrawerFooter>
    </DrawerContent>
</Drawer>

@code {
    private bool _snapOpen;
    private int _snapIndex = 1;                      // open at 75%
    private double[] _snapPoints = { 0.4, 0.75, 1.0 };
}

parameters.name: SnapPoints
parameters.description: vaul-style snap points: fractional resting heights in ascending order, each 0 < f ≤ 1 (e.g. [0.4, 0.75, 1] = 40% / 75% / fully open). When set on a Top/Bottom drawer, the panel rests at one of these heights, drags between them, and dismisses when flicked/dragged below the lowest. Ignored for Left/Right (which keep plain swipe-to-dismiss). (#218)

parameters.name: ActiveSnapPoint
parameters.description: Index into SnapPoints of the current resting snap. Two-way bindable: updates as the user drags between snaps, and setting it moves the drawer programmatically. -1 (default) opens at the most-open (last) snap. (#218)

parameters.name: ZIndex
parameters.description: Backdrop z-index. Content sits at ZIndex + 1. Defaults to BaseZIndex; OverlayProvider supplies an incrementing value per nested overlay.

mdSummary:
# Drawer

Slide-up sheet for mobile-first contextual content.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Overlay
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/drawer

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Drawer | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Drawer | Open | `bool` | `` |  |
| Drawer | OpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| Drawer | OnBeforeClose | `EventCallback<DismissEventArgs>` | `` | Fires before any user-initiated dismiss (Escape, backdrop click, swipe gesture, or a DrawerClose trigger). Set Cancel to true to abort. The Reason tells you which path fired ("escape", "outside", "swipe", "close"). |
| Drawer | IsOpen | `bool` | `` |  |
| Drawer | IsOpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| DrawerClose | Context | `Drawer.DrawerContext` | `default!` |  |
| DrawerClose | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| DrawerClose | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| DrawerClose | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| DrawerContent | Context | `Drawer.DrawerContext` | `default!` |  |
| DrawerContent | Shell | `OverlayShellMarker?` | `` |  |
| DrawerContent | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| DrawerContent | Side | `Lumeo.Side` | `Lumeo.Side.Bottom` |  |
| DrawerContent | Animation | `DrawerAnimation` | `DrawerAnimation.Slide` |  |
| DrawerContent | PreventClose | `bool` | `` |  |
| DrawerContent | SnapPoints | `IReadOnlyList<double>?` | `` | vaul-style snap points: fractional resting heights in ascending order, each 0 < f ≤ 1 (e.g. [0.4, 0.75, 1] = 40% / 75% / fully open). When set on a Top/Bottom drawer, the panel rests at one of these heights, drags between them, and dismisses when flicked/dragged below the lowest. Ignored for Left/Right (which keep plain swipe-to-dismiss). (#218) |
| DrawerContent | ActiveSnapPoint | `int` | `-1` | Index into SnapPoints of the current resting snap. Two-way bindable: updates as the user drags between snaps, and setting it moves the drawer programmatically. -1 (default) opens at the most-open (last) snap. (#218) |
| DrawerContent | ActiveSnapPointChanged | `EventCallback<int>` | `` |  |
| DrawerContent | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| DrawerContent | ZIndex | `int` | `OverlayService.BaseZIndex` | Backdrop z-index. Content sits at ZIndex + 1. Defaults to BaseZIndex; OverlayProvider supplies an incrementing value per nested overlay. |
| DrawerContent | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| DrawerDescription | Context | `Drawer.DrawerContext` | `default!` |  |
| DrawerDescription | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| DrawerDescription | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| DrawerDescription | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| DrawerFooter | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| DrawerFooter | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| DrawerFooter | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| DrawerHeader | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| DrawerHeader | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| DrawerHeader | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| DrawerTitle | Context | `Drawer.DrawerContext` | `default!` |  |
| DrawerTitle | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| DrawerTitle | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| DrawerTitle | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| DrawerTrigger | Context | `Drawer.DrawerContext` | `default!` |  |
| DrawerTrigger | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| DrawerTrigger | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| DrawerTrigger | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Drawer) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (DrawerClose) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (DrawerContent) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (DrawerDescription) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (DrawerFooter) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (DrawerHeader) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (DrawerTitle) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (DrawerTrigger) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `OpenChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`)
- `OnBeforeClose` (`EventCallback<DismissEventArgs>`) — Fires before any user-initiated dismiss (Escape, backdrop click, swipe gesture, or a DrawerClose trigger). Set Cancel to true to abort. The Reason tells you which path fired ("escape", "outside", "swipe", "close").
- `IsOpenChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`)

## Sub-components
- `DrawerClose`, `DrawerContent`, `DrawerDescription`, `DrawerFooter`, `DrawerHeader`, `DrawerTitle`, `DrawerTrigger`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`Drawer.DrawerContext`)
- `Shell` (`OverlayShellMarker?`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
- `Escape` — HandleKeyDown handles Escape in DrawerContent.razor

## Example
```razor
<Drawer />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-background`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Drawer/Drawer.razor`
- `UI/Drawer/DrawerClose.razor`
- `UI/Drawer/DrawerContent.razor`
- `UI/Drawer/DrawerDescription.razor`
- `UI/Drawer/DrawerFooter.razor`
- `UI/Drawer/DrawerHeader.razor`
- `UI/Drawer/DrawerTitle.razor`
- `UI/Drawer/DrawerTrigger.razor`
